message:
fix(mux): CWD inheritance and split panel dimension issues

- Add CWD inheritance: new tabs/splits inherit working directory from
  active panel, initial terminal starts in directory where termweb launched
- Fix split dimension calculation: horizontal splits use half width/full
  height, vertical splits use full width/half height
- Add awaiting_resize flag: split panels wait for correct resize before
  streaming to prevent wrong-size frames during split
- Pause parent panel during split until resize is received
- Fix resize observer: use element instead of container, add rAF for
  accurate layout timing
- Send immediate resize for both panels after DOM split completes
- Remove previous/next tab shortcuts (browser intercepts Ctrl+Tab, ⌘⇧[/])

files.patch:
@@ -1407,8 +1407,8 @@ Window
⛶Toggle Full Screen⌘⇧F
-
◀Show Previous Tab⌃⇧Tab
-
▶Show Next Tab⌃Tab

+
▶Show Next Tab
⤢Zoom Split⌘⇧↵
⇤Select Previous Split⌘[
